caption:
53% of visitors leave a website if it takes more than 3 seconds to load.

That's not a fun fact — that's lost revenue.

Most WordPress sites in Mauritius score 40–60 on Google PageSpeed. Our builds score 90+. The difference is Next.js — the same framework Netflix and Nike use.

Faster site = better Google ranking = more customers finding you before they find your competitor.

Test yours free at pagespeed.web.dev
